description: A local charity requests a donation of four tickets to an upcoming family show for their fundraising auction.

nodes.task_description: Receive and log the donation request from the charity.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a record of the request.
Agent confirms the charity is a registered 501(c)(3).

nodes.task_description: Get approval from the community relations manager for the donation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent forwards the request and receives approval.

nodes.task_description: Issue a voucher for four tickets to the charity and mail it to them.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates and sends the ticket voucher.
